query:
ALTER TABLE projects 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceType VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'youtube',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceFileUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceFileName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceText TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceTopic VARCHAR(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceAudioUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceImageUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cefrLevel VARCHAR(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS language VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'en',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetAge VARCHAR(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lessonStyle VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lessonGoal TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS schoolType VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS topics JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS keywords JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS thumbnailUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS coverImageUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS duration INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wordCount INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS errorMessage TEXT;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3jSTeLwusgZ5vA4.e25c75454290 --database Zbe6Q3R9U5CC97jFsUqeys --execute

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS schoolType VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS topics JSON,

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS coverImageUrl TEXT,
